patient_name.label: Full Name
patient_name.helpText: Enter your name exactly as it appears on your government-issued ID

blood_group.label: Blood Group (Optional)
blood_group.helpText: If known — helps in emergency situations

phone_number.label: Mobile Number
phone_number.helpText: We will send appointment confirmations to this number

address.label: Residential Address
address.placeholder: House number, street, locality, city, PIN code

allergies.label: Known Allergies
allergies.placeholder: List any known allergies e.g. Penicillin, Dust

current_medications.label: Current Medications
current_medications.placeholder: List medications with dosage e.g. Metformin 500mg

primary_condition.label: Primary Reason for Visit
primary_condition.placeholder: Briefly describe your condition or symptoms

treatment_consent.label: I consent to examination and treatment by the assigned medical team

data_sharing_consent.label: I consent to my medical data being shared with treating physicians and relevant clinical staff
data_sharing_consent.helpText: Your data is protected under applicable healthcare privacy regulations

errors.patient_name.minLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.patient_name.invalidChars: Name can only contain letters and spaces
errors.date_of_birth.future: Date of birth cannot be in the future
errors.date_of_birth.maxAge: Please enter a valid date of birth
errors.phone_number.invalidLength: Mobile number must be exactly 10 digits
errors.phone_number.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid Indian mobile number
errors.email_address.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid email address
errors.primary_condition.minLength: Please describe your condition in at least 3 characters
errors.treatment_consent.required: You must consent to treatment to proceed
errors.data_sharing_consent.required: You must consent to data sharing to proceed
errors.emergency_contact_name.minLength: Emergency contact name must be at least 2 characters
errors.emergency_contact_phone.invalidLength: Emergency contact number must be exactly 10 digits
errors.emergency_contact_phone.invalidFormat: Please enter a valid Indian mobile number
errors.emergency_contact_phone.required: Please enter a valid emergency contact number
errors.emergency_contact_name.required: Please enter a valid emergency contact name
errors.primary_condition.required: Please mention the reason for visit
